LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshenVambraces.label: forge ashen vambraces
LanguageData.ABY_CraftAshenVambraces.description: Assemble early abyssal forearm braces from dark steel plates, residue-lined hinge bands and crude ember conduits.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftVectorVambraces.label: forge rift vector vambraces
LanguageData.ABY_CraftRiftVectorVambraces.description: Build mid-tier forearm modules around plasteel braces and paired rift-vector conduits.
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownAuthorityVambraces.label: forge crown authority vambraces
LanguageData.ABY_CraftCrownAuthorityVambraces.descrip: Construct late-line crown-authority vambraces around a compact command lattice and crowned core fragment.
